description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine accc_with_cor_3, and is implemented by a call to accc_with_cor_3. This API is the second release of function to run AC contingency analysis with corrective actions. Corrective actions are specified automatically to eliminate the violations in each post contingency solution with the objective of minimizing the controls adjustments including load shedding, MW generation dispatch, phase shifter angle adjustments, off-line generator controls, tap setting adjustments and switched shunt controls. Please note that flows are checked against rating set program option setting and 100.0 percent of the rating to determine flow overload violations. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = accc_with_cor_2(tol, optacc, optcor, values, labels, dfxfile, accfile, thrfile, inlfile)
python_syntax: ierr = accc_with_cor_2(tol, optacc, optcor, values, labels, dfxfile, accfile, thrfile, inlfile)

parameters.name: tol
parameters.description: Mismatch tolerance. (input; Newton solution convergence tolerance, TOLN, by default).

parameters.name: optacc
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying power flow solution. (input).

parameters.name: optcor
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying corrective actions options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying corrective actions parameters. (input).

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: An array of seven elements specifying subsystem labels. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of distribution factor data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Name of contingency solution output file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: thrfile
parameters.description: Name of load throwover data file. (input; blank for none).

parameters.name: inlfile
parameters.description: Name of unit inertia data file. (input; blank for none).

optacc.description: tap adjustment flag (tap adjustment option setting by default).
area interchange adjustment flag (area interchange adjustment option setting by default).
enable using tie line flows only in calculating area interchange.
enable using tie line flows and loads in calculating area interchange.
phase shift adjustment flag (phase shift adjustment option setting by default).
dc tap adjustment flag (dc tap adjustment option setting by default).
switched shunt adjustment flag (switched shunt adjustment option setting by default).
non-divergent solution flag (non-divergent solution option setting by default).

optcor.description: number of power flows (1 by default).
phase shifter control flag (1 by default).
off-line generator control flag (0 by default).
tap setting adjustment flag (0 by default).
switched shunt control flag (0 by default).

values.description: bus voltage violation tolerance (0.1 by default).
branch overload violation tolerance (0.1 by default).
generator control weighting factor (1.0 by default).
load control weighting factor (1.0 by default).
phase shifter control weighting factor (1.0 by default).
off-line generator control weighting factor (1.0 by default).
tap setting adjustment weighting factor (1.0 by default).
switched shunt control weighting factor (1.0 by default).

labels.description: label of generation dispatch subsystem (blank by default, no default allowed if OPTACC(8) is not 0).
label of generator control subsystem (blank by default, no default allowed if OPTCOR(3) is 1).
label of load control subsystem (blank by default, no default allowed if OPTCOR(4) is 1).
label of phase shifter control subsystem (blank by default, no default allowed if OPTCOR(5) is 1).
off-line generator control subsystem (blank by default; no default allowed if OPTCOR(6) is 1).
tap setting adjustment subsystem (blank by default; no default allowed if OPTCOR(7) is 1).
switched shunt control subsystem (blank by default; no default allowed if OPTCOR(8) is 1).

error_codes.description: buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
too many islands in base case.
file DFXFILE is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
monitored elements exceed limit when adding multisection line members.
error opening Unit Inertia Data File.
error opening Contingency Solution Output File.
error opening Distribution Factor Data File.
error opening Load Throwover Data File.
prerequisite requirements for function not met.
